eng.definition: so foolish, unreasonable, or out of place as to be amusing
examples: His ludicrous claims were dismissed by the court.
The idea of a flying car seems ludicrous to many.
She made a ludicrous attempt to disguise herself with a fake mustache.

hin.definition: Agreement with or approval of something or someone
examples: मुझे उसकी योजना से सहमति है.
हमें इस बारे में सहमति बनानी होगी.
